base.rationale: Candidate exceeds minimum requirements with 9+ years of relevant experience and possesses all 6 required skills (Python, REST API Design, System Design, Docker, Git, and SQL is absent) plus 3 nice-to-have skills (AWS, GraphQL, Kubernetes not mentioned), with only SQL as a notable gap among required competencies.

Candidate meets 5 of 6 required skills (missing Docker and SQL) with 3 years of relevant experience (below 4-year minimum), but includes 1 nice-to-have skill (GraphQL), resulting in a qualified but incomplete profile for a Senior role.

Candidate meets only 2 of 6 required skills (System Design, SQL) and lacks Python, REST API Design, Docker, and Git; experience timeline suggests insufficient tenure in role to verify the stated 4-year minimum requirement.

Candidate exceeds minimum requirements with 5+ years of relevant backend experience and demonstrates mastery of all required skills (Python, SQL, REST API Design, System Design, Git) plus multiple nice-to-have skills (Kafka, GraphQL); only missing Docker and cloud/container orchestration experience from the complete profile.

Candidate meets minimum experience requirement (7 years since 2017 graduation) and possesses 5 of 6 required skills (Python, REST API Design, System Design, Docker), plus 1 nice-to-have skill (GraphQL), but lacks SQL which is a required skill and has no experience with other valuable technologies like Kubernetes, Redis, AWS, or Kafka.

Candidate has 1-2 years of experience (well below 4-year minimum) and only demonstrates 2 of 6 required skills (Python, REST API Design), missing critical requirements: SQL, System Design, Docker, and Git.
